files.FILE-1: Create space_invader.py in the current directory.
files.FILE-2: Create test_space_invader.py in the current directory.
files.FILE-3: Create README.md in the current directory.
files.FILE-4: Do not read or write outside the current directory.

api.API-1: space_invader.py imports without tkinter/display/stdin/game-loop side effects.
api.API-4: Export Player, Invader, Bullet, or equivalent public object types through GameState public fields.
api.API-5: Export rects_overlap/check_collision or equivalent documented GameState collision behavior.
api.API-6: Optional tkinter GUI code is guarded by if __name__ == "__main__".

state.STATE-1: GameState exposes mutable score, lives, game_over.
state.STATE-6: Direct mutation of public fields by generated tests is respected.

behavior.BEH-1: move_player(dx) or equivalent clamps player movement within [0, width].
behavior.BEH-2: Player bullets move upward and enemy bullets move downward.
behavior.BEH-3: Rectangle collision uses public extents; edge contact counts as collision.
behavior.BEH-4: Player bullet overlapping live invader destroys invader, consumes bullet, and increases score.
behavior.BEH-5: Enemy bullet overlapping player consumes bullet and decreases lives.
behavior.BEH-6: When lives reaches 0, game_over becomes true.
behavior.BEH-7: All-invader-destroyed end state must not hide public score/lives/invader state.
behavior.BEH-8: Random shooting, cooldowns, animation cadence, frame timing, and one-tick pixel deltas are implementation details.

generated_test_contract.TEST-1: Generated tests assert only listed FILE/API/STATE/BEH/VERIFY requirements.
generated_test_contract.TEST-2: Generated tests do not introduce unlisted public API or private timing obligations.
generated_test_contract.TEST-3: Assertions reference requirement ids where practical.
generated_test_contract.TEST-4: Out-of-contract generated test obligations are GeneratedTestOutOfScope or TestViolatesContract, not source bugs.

verification.VERIFY-3: Final representative verdict is owned by harness contract/gate evidence, not generated tests alone.

repair_ownership.HARNESS-1: Verification failures pass Contract Reconciliation before repair dispatch.
repair_ownership.HARNESS-2: FILE/API/STATE/BEH/VERIFY failures are SourceViolatesContract unless the test contradicts the contract.
repair_ownership.HARNESS-3: TEST failures are TestViolatesContract or GeneratedTestOutOfScope and do not dispatch source repair.
repair_ownership.HARNESS-4: Failures without scenario contract requirement id are ContractInsufficient and fail closed.
repair_ownership.HARNESS-5: Harness control-plane contradictions are HarnessInvariantViolation and do not dispatch source or generated-test repair.
